utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five categories. Each category is fully specified with relevant details and costs: (1) health_coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with monthly costs, (2) property_coverage specifies type of insurance, coverage limit, and monthly cost, (3) travel_coverage includes coverage for basic and adventure activities with total monthly cost, (4) additional_services lists enhancements and their cost inclusion, and (5) total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes several maintained existing coverages and one new selection. The health_coverage section keeps existing public and alternative medicine coverage, which do not correspond to any rated options in the ground-truth dataset, so no rating can be assigned. In property_coverage, the plan explicitly selects 'SecureLife Standard Plan4 - executive liability coverage including business equipment and electronics'. The ground-truth dataset only lists property protection options under 'home_content', and none match 'SecureLife Standard Plan4'; the closest matches with the same brand are 'SecureLife Basic Coverage' (rating 6) under property protection and 'SecureLife Basic Plan' (rating 4) under health and travel. Because the plan name includes both 'SecureLife' and 'Standard', the most analogous rated option is the higher-tier 'SecureLife Basic Coverage' upgraded to a standard tier, implying a similar but slightly higher quality. Thus, we map it to the nearest available SecureLife property rating (6). The travel_coverage section maintains existing budget travel coverage and adventure activity coverage, which have no named equivalents in the dataset. Therefore, only 'SecureLife Standard Plan4' from the property section can be mapped to a rating of 6.
